title: Garlic's Snails
description: This Minecraft mod adds small yet pesky Snails.
body:
# Garlic's Snails

Garlic's Snails adds pesky little Snails to Minecraft.

![Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc67ea9b288746ee06b2228b4045b6d32f115d5.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BvqPmBwJ_xY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🐌 Mobs 🐌

### Snails:
- Seeks to eat crops and some other plants such as dandelions and torchflowers
- Has a 10% chance to drop slimeballs after eating a crop.
- Can be bred with carrots, beetroots, and bonemeal resulting in a Snailet; a baby Snail. 
- Body color can be either tan, green, or red.
- Shell color can be either brown, mustard, or maroon.
- Sizes can vary slightly, being larger or smaller.

### Immortal Snail:
- Can be summoned by giving a Snail a Totem of Undying.
- Kills you upon contact.
- Using non-melee weapons will instantly kill you.
- If fed a Enchanted Golden Apple; It will be left vunerable for 5 Minutes and can be killed.
- 300 Health Points


Garlic's Snails is the spiritual successor to Gastropod Galore. This mod, as of now, aims to bring and refine certain features from Gastropod Galore while keeping the mod in a smaller scale.
